text:
Kalanoro - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018391

Video Description (Consumer Facing):
📅 Launching August 27, 2026 on PlayStation 5.

Kalanoro is a colorful action-adventure inspired by Malagasy folklore, where you'll recruit legendary lemur musicians, grow your band's fame across Lemuria, and challenge the evil witch Raneny in a quest to save the island—one song at a time. 🎶🐒

🎤 Jyeuhair joins the adventure as a special guest in the demo!

Experience a brand-new Live Music Performance featuring an original song composed exclusively for Kalanoro, performed alongside Kalakely in a unique in-game musical event.

🎵 Original Music
Jason Rhobinson
© Universal Music Publishing, Push It Group

🎮 *Play the Demo!*

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Stupid Never Dies - Second Trailer | PS5 Games
Coming Fall 2026!

Davy, the timid zombie protagonist, has one dream: to bring Julia back to life and take her on a date.
To make that dream come true, he ventures into a dangerous otherworldly dungeon.

There will be times when powerful enemies leave him completely battered—but with the support of his eccentric companions, Davy keeps pushing forward.

Bite, Rip, Rise to your way to the top!

Stupid Never Dies—the underdog adventure of the weakest zombie rising against all odds.

text:
Fallout 76: Infestations - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/fallout-76/

Answer the call now, help defeat Infestations! Play the latest free update today! 
 
Redeem FREE* daily rewards June 7 to June 15. 

Explore, quest, build, craft, and fight across a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Appalachia’s familiar places can host some unfriendly faces with Infestations! Rediscover “infested” areas across the map teeming with high-level foes and high-level loot, including new 4-Star Legendary weapons and armor mods! (That is, if you don’t all wind up exterminated instead.) 

*To obtain daily rewards, you must: (1) own or have access to Fallout 76, and (2) create or login to your Bethesda.net account.  Void where prohibited.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
"Arisen, your time has come once again. 🔥

Dragon's Dogma 2 returns as Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen! Your unwritten epic begins on PS5, October 9, 2026. 

The dynamic fantasy world is expanded with new tales and thrilling encounters. Embark to a snowy new area in the north: the long-abandoned Norgan region, and take on 12 new dungeon challenges spread across the existing world of Dragon's Dogma 2. Also bring your Arisen and Pawns to life with new hairstyles and tattoo options.

Free Title Updates are on the way! The first arrives June 9 with quality-of-life improvements, including the addition of an Eternal Ferrystone and more Portcrystals. A second update in August brings framerate and performance improvements to all platforms, additional save slots, and many more adjustments and improvements. 

Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen contains both the Dragon's Dogma 2 base game and the Dark Arisen Expansion content in one package. The Dark Arisen Expansion will be available as a separate DLC on PS5.

#ps5 #ps5games
